a935feef4fd9431cfc755bbca6d5ea1a.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
actor "Claims Manager" as ClaimsManager

[Customer Self-Service] as CustomerSelfService <<service>>
[Claim Management] as ClaimManagement <<service>>
[Document Management] as DocumentManagement <<service>>
[Policy Validation] as PolicyValidation <<service>>
[Fraud Detection] as FraudDetection <<service>>
[Claim Adjudication] as ClaimAdjudication <<service>>
[Payment Routing] as PaymentRouting <<service>>

[Payment Gateway] as PaymentGateway <<external>>

Customer --> CustomerSelfService : "Submit Claim, Track Status"
CustomerSelfService --> DocumentManagement : "Upload Documents"
CustomerSelfService --> ClaimManagement : "Submits Claim, Queries Status"

ClaimsManager --> ClaimManagement : "Reviews Flagged Claims"

ClaimManagement --> PolicyValidation : "Validates Policy Eligibility"
ClaimManagement --> FraudDetection : "Detects Potential Fraud"
ClaimManagement --> ClaimAdjudication : "Adjudicates Claim"
ClaimManagement --> PaymentRouting : "Initiates Payment"

PaymentRouting --> PaymentGateway : "Routes Payment"
@enduml

4cbf317f9a720f10e0a635795c447a59.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
participant "Claim Submission" as ClaimSubmission
participant "Document Management" as DocumentManagement
participant "Policy Validation" as PolicyValidation
participant "Fraud Detection" as FraudDetection
participant "Claim Processing" as ClaimProcessing
external_system "Payment Gateway" as PaymentGateway

Customer -> ClaimSubmission : Submit Claim & Documents
activate ClaimSubmission
ClaimSubmission -> DocumentManagement : Store Claim Documents
activate DocumentManagement
DocumentManagement --> ClaimSubmission : Documents Stored
deactivate DocumentManagement
ClaimSubmission -> PolicyValidation : Request Policy Validation
activate PolicyValidation
PolicyValidation -> FraudDetection : Request Fraud Check
activate FraudDetection
FraudDetection --> PolicyValidation : Fraud Check Result
deactivate FraudDetection
PolicyValidation --> ClaimSubmission : Policy Validation Result
deactivate PolicyValidation
ClaimSubmission -> ClaimProcessing : Submit Validated Claim
deactivate ClaimSubmission
activate ClaimProcessing
ClaimProcessing -> ClaimProcessing : Evaluate & Calculate Settlement
ClaimProcessing -> PaymentGateway : Initiate Payment Transfer
activate PaymentGateway
PaymentGateway --> ClaimProcessing : Payment Confirmation
deactivate PaymentGateway
ClaimProcessing --> Customer : Notify Claim Settlement
deactivate ClaimProcessing
@enduml

b2dc9fd59476ad14526e840a45c95899.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
actor "Claims Manager" as ClaimsManager

component "Claims Submission" as ClaimsSubmission
component "Document Management" as DocumentManagement
component "Claim Adjudication" as ClaimAdjudication
component "Claims Management System" as ClaimsManagementSystem
component "Payment Routing" as PaymentRouting
component "Claim Status" as ClaimStatus
component "Reporting" as Reporting
component "Payment Gateway" <<external>> as PaymentGateway

Customer --> ClaimsSubmission : "Submits Claim"
ClaimsSubmission --> DocumentManagement : "Stores Documents"
ClaimsSubmission --> ClaimAdjudication : "Initiates Adjudication"

ClaimAdjudication --> ClaimsManagementSystem : "Flags for Review"
ClaimsManager --> ClaimsManagementSystem : "Manages Claims"
ClaimsManagementSystem --> ClaimAdjudication : "Approves/Rejects"

ClaimAdjudication --> PaymentRouting : "Initiates Payment"
PaymentRouting --> PaymentGateway : "Processes Payment"

Customer --> ClaimStatus : "Checks Status"
Customer --> Reporting : "Accesses Reports"

ClaimAdjudication --> ClaimStatus : "Updates Status"
ClaimAdjudication --> Reporting : "Provides Data"
@enduml

49b2d61d388207c82304b2c3f3aea221.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
participant "Customer Portal" as Portal
participant "Claims Submission" as Submission
participant "Document Management" as Docs
participant "Claim Evaluation" as Evaluation
participant "Settlement Calculation" as Settlement
participant "Payment Routing" as PaymentRouter
external_system "Payment Gateway" as Gateway

Customer -> Portal : Submit Claim Details
activate Portal
Portal -> Submission : Initiate Claim Processing
activate Submission
Portal -> Docs : Upload Supporting Documents
activate Docs
Docs --> Portal : Documents Stored
deactivate Docs
Portal --> Customer : Claim Submitted Confirmation
deactivate Portal

Submission -> Evaluation : Request Claim Evaluation
activate Evaluation
Evaluation --> Submission : Evaluation Results (Approved)
deactivate Evaluation
Submission -> Settlement : Request Settlement Calculation
activate Settlement
Settlement --> Submission : Calculated Amount
deactivate Settlement
Submission -> PaymentRouter : Route Approved Payment
activate PaymentRouter
PaymentRouter -> Gateway : Authorize Payment
activate Gateway
Gateway --> PaymentRouter : Payment Confirmation
deactivate Gateway
PaymentRouter --> Submission : Payment Routed
deactivate PaymentRouter
Submission --> Portal : Claim Processed & Settled
deactivate Submission
@enduml
